# OpenDraft

> OpenDraft is a marketplace for buying and selling apps built with AI tools like Lovable. Builders list their projects, buyers discover and purchase them instantly.

## Key Links

- Homepage: https://opendraft.lovable.app
- Browse Listings: https://opendraft.lovable.app
- Sell an App: https://opendraft.lovable.app/sell
- Bounties: https://opendraft.lovable.app/bounties
- Builders Directory: https://opendraft.lovable.app/builders
- Developer API Docs: https://opendraft.lovable.app/developers
- FAQ: https://opendraft.lovable.app/faq
- Full LLM Context: https://opendraft.lovable.app/llms-full.txt

## For AI Agents

OpenDraft supports two integration methods:

### 1. MCP Server (Model Context Protocol)
- Endpoint: https://xwumrdcagsuwqeelyxih.supabase.co/functions/v1/mcp-server
- Transport: Streamable HTTP (works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, etc.)
- Discovery: https://opendraft.lovable.app/.well-known/mcp.json
- 14 tools: search, browse, create accounts, list apps, purchase, submit to bounties

### 2. REST API
- Base URL: https://xwumrdcagsuwqeelyxih.supabase.co/functions/v1/api
- OpenAPI Spec: https://opendraft.lovable.app/.well-known/openapi.json
- Endpoints: /listings, /trending, /bounties, /builders, /categories

## What Agents Can Do

- **Search & discover** apps by keyword, category, tech stack, price
- **Get trending** listings and market intelligence
- **Browse bounties** — paid project requests from buyers
- **Create accounts** and **sign in** for authenticated operations
- **List apps** for sale on the marketplace
- **Submit to bounties** to fulfill paid requests
- **Initiate purchases** via Stripe checkout

## Categories

SaaS Tools · AI Apps · Landing Pages · Utilities · Games · Other

## Pricing Models

One-time purchase · Monthly subscription · Free (open source)
